summary: Frontend-only code review and verification for medication invoice amount fields and monthly purchase section. All features implemented correctly. Full UI testing requires Google OAuth authentication.

findings: ✅ medicineInvoiceAmount field added (lines 57, 914-928) - appears for non-injection forms when isPrescriptionManager=true
✅ injectionInvoiceAmount field added (lines 60, 971-985) - appears for Injection form when isPrescriptionManager=true
✅ Both fields have proper data-testid attributes (medicine-invoice-amount-input, injection-invoice-amount-input)
✅ Fields correctly parsed as float and sent to backend (lines 407-417)
✅ Edit mode pre-populates invoice amounts from initialData (lines 106, 109)
✅ Stock display added in medication list (lines 1021-1060)
✅ Tablet/Capsule stock shows count with color-coded badges (red <10, orange <20, green >=20)
✅ Injection stock shows vials count and IU remaining
✅ Cost per unit displayed when available
✅ Invoice purchase amount: sum of medicine_invoice_amount + injection_invoice_amount (lines 111-115)
✅ Buy Medicines Now button with medicine_order_link redirect (lines 304-315, data-testid='buy-medicines-btn')
✅ Buy Injections Now button with injection_order_link redirect (lines 316-327, data-testid='buy-injections-btn')
✅ Section only shows when showPurchaseSection is true (totalInvoiceAmount > 0 OR totalMonthlyCost > shipping)
✅ Fields are Optional[float] with None default

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are correctly implemented
Code follows existing patterns and conventions
Proper conditional rendering based on isPrescriptionManager prop
Monthly cost calculation logic is correct: (daily dosage × 30 days × cost_per_unit) + ₹100 shipping
context_for_next_testing_agent: All invoice amount fields and monthly purchase section features are correctly implemented. To manually test: 1) Login as diabexpertonline@gmail.com (admin), 2) Go to /prescription-manager, 3) Select a user and click 'Manage Medications', 4) Add/Edit a medication to see invoice amount fields, 5) Login as auctionpicksindia@gmail.com (staff user), 6) Go to /medications to see Monthly Purchase section (requires medications with cost_per_unit or invoice amounts set by admin).
